verdict.summary: The round-1 blocker is resolved. set_review_state now removes only review labels present in its validated live snapshot, so a review:needs-user hold arriving after the read is not targeted for deletion. The new interleaving self-test is non-vacuous: it would fail under the former full-REVIEW_LABELS removal loop, and it also verifies removal of the observed stale label. Existing live-hold refusal, ambiguous-state fail-closed behavior, malformed-payload rejection, and get_review_state handling are covered with assertions that distinguish incorrect outcomes. I found no blocker, major, or other diff-scoped issue requiring changes.
